Suites / River Suite

River Suite

★★★★★4.99 · 48 stays
Sleeps 2Plunge poolRiver deck112 m²

The suite

Glass-walled on three sides and cantilevered over the dry riverbed, the River Suite is the lodge's signature space. A heated plunge pool runs the length of the deck; below it, the sand where elephant and buffalo cross at dawn.

Inside: a sculptural bath, a fireplace for winter mornings, and a sala daybed angled at the waterhole. Floor-to-ceiling glass slides away entirely, so there's nothing between you and the bush.

Fully inclusive

Twice-daily game drives
All meals & bush dining
Selected wines & bar
Guided bush walks
Private plunge pool
Starlink Wi-Fi & A/C

Good to know

Children 12+ welcome in the River Suite. Road transfers and charter flights arranged on request. A conservation levy supports anti-poaching across the reserve. Minimum two-night stay.

R12,500pp / night · all-inclusive
R25,000 × 3 nightsR75,000
Conservation levyR900
TotalR75,900
Reserve
No booking fees · the rate you see is the rate you pay
